name: configtransformtask
description: An opinionated task to transform configuration files of various formats

scripts.test: npm run build && mocha dist/tests/_suite.js --reporter spec
scripts.build:prod: npm install && npm run build && npm ci --omit=dev
scripts.build:vsix: npm run build:prod && cd ../../src && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json

author: Dominik Zarsky
